summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QZap AI Quiz App. Frontend works excellently with proper routing, UI components, and language toggle. Backend APIs are functional but auth flow has Supabase-related configuration issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Email validation too strict - rejects standard email formats
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot signup with common email formats

critical_bugs.issue: Supabase email confirmation required but not handled in frontend
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot login after signup without email confirmation

rate_limiting.issue: Rate limiting prevents testing signup functionality
rate_limiting.impact: Testing and user registration blocked after few attempts

ui_bugs.issue: Some mobile elements may not be properly accessible on smaller screens

integration_issues.issue: No email confirmation handling in UI after signup

passed_tests: Landing page loads with proper branding
Auth page form validation and UI elements present
All protected routes properly redirect to auth
No console errors on public pages
Backend API root and health endpoints functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Supabase email confirmation flow - either disable email confirmation or implement confirmation handling in frontend
Review email validation in signup endpoint to accept standard email formats
Add proper error handling and user feedback for auth failures
Consider adding loading states and better UX for authentication flows
Test with valid Supabase credentials to verify full auth flow

success_percentage.backend: 40% - Basic APIs work but auth flow has issues
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Excellent UI/UX, minor mobile accessibility issues
